channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 49 replies — 91.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-03-05 13:34 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932513
>>61932327
>i-i-i'm a bajillionaire....
cope, stinky

61932516
>>61932513
Haha, you don't understand. It doesn't matter what i do or do not have. Anons do.

61932522
If we could be guaranteed that link would moon to $500 tomorrow but 10% of us would be injected with AIDS. Would you guys vote for that happening?

61932558
Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe. It’s quite literally in their best interest to keep this shit low.

61932671
It has been a brutal hold and I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit. I could have semi retired in 2021 but didn't sell.

61932731
Crazy how these threads are always 95 percent the same brown fuddie cockroach hopping ids and replying to himself to give the illusion of consensus.
Like there's no point whatsoever. Everyone's on x where you're salty and blocked and nothing posted here changes or does anything lmao. A million hours wasted on nothing

Herbs

61932783
>>61932731
Crazy how you keep seasoning dozens and even hundreds of threads after all these years and yet you keep coming back to them like a pig at the trough.
One might even be liberal enough to say that you keep coming back to them as if you were a paypig at the trough.

61932904
>>61932558
Link will be $999 in 2126 and fudies WILL ROPE

>just hold for a century bruv

61932907
>>61932731
Ok but price? Chart?

61933029
its funny seeing the same fudders unleashing their pent up vitriol day in day out fudding their own shitcoin after all these years, brain damaged cucks lmao. You retards were smug yourselves, wasted 2 bull markets in a row being all uppity and keeping le normies out xddd, should have bought some other shitcoins and not sat on your asses hahaha maybe then you wouldnt waste your life f5'ing this dead board to cry about link (the same token that makes up 90+% of your portfolio because you're a dumb poorfaggot who has 0 clue how to make money)

61933088
>>61932522
yes

61933115
>>61933029
Nice essay but adem won

61934197
>>61933088
checked, but if you say yes then you are auto included in that 10%

61934242
money talks

61934584
>>61932086
correct. the boyscouts tried to dish it out, but they sure as hell can't take it

all talk, no walk

their hubris was their downfall
>>61932295

look at how low energy you are bro. you have no material, you have no gains, you have no confidence

take that L like a man

61934590
>>61932558
>Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe.


i would pay to see one of you awkward losers try to hire a hitman in real life. if by some miracle you even managed to contact one of these groups, i imagine they'd look you over, make sure no one was around, and just take your money and then disappear

at which point you'd have no other option other than to to back to larping as a badass online

61935620
take the L, stinkbots

61936147
>>61934590
>well they'll never find my suicidal porn blog entries or notice my simping after niggerdick on x
>well they'll never find out that I'm a third worlder who dropped out of business school to join a mlm scam company that got busted
>well they'll never find out what I look like
>well they'll never message people I know
>well they'll just forget I sold my stack for wormhole and linksol and that I got irrevocably fucked as a result

You thought all of those things at one stage, now everyone including you knows how incredibly incredibly retarded you are... but dw I'm sure that
>well nothing will ACTUALLY happen when some mentally ill new millionaires target me for sport

Will totally hold and you'll be perfectly fine lil fella

61938160
>>61931684
Agreed. Endless "partnerships" and paid pilots ending up providing price feeds. The entire token has zero purpose outside inserting a fee and does nothing solution wise. It doesn't even make sense but the cult of followers just ignore this and never even argue against it and act like it is getting exposure to the core product success of the company. I seriously have no idea how they can be like this if they legitimately aren't paid shills.

61938725
money talks

61938733
I built my own oracle with AI lol. Theres a reason its the price that it is. not special.

61938776
>>61938160
This is good fud

61938896
>>61938776
It is just reality, which itself turns out to be pretty good fud when the fervor dies down.

61938901
>>61932086
This. They were ENDLESSLY smug. They acted indistinguishable from indians and their coin is indistinguishable from jewish rent seeking with no utility beyond pumping sirgay's pockets while he fuck you.

61938913
>>61934590
>He thinks it would happen irl

61938917
>>61932298
Cheap linkies again? Sign me up

61938935
Chainlink is unique among shitcoins though because it's more like a cult. I can remember a few years these people spamming up every forum I frequented including places that had nothing to do with crypto or finance. A deranged cackle of midwits who became giddy at every "partnership" and "on-chain utility" thinking they were so ahead of the market and that they were geniuses. That's why they are baggies, they are too emotionally invested and their ego cannot handle accepting that they were scammed. Most people who get rugged in a shitcoin scam at least know on some level that it's a pump and dump coin but that they were just too late to enter and too late to sell.

61938954
Cardano is worse
>tfw dropped $5000 on it back when it was $3 in 2021 like a retard
>it's currently $0.40
>been holding it patiently waiting to break even to get my money back

61939099
>>61932038
you do realize that if chainlink goes to zero people will be posting about it here for years, right?

61939107
>>61932327
>>61932513
>>61932516
>that link poster who is fully all-in dca no matter what also has millions available to buy a dip
personally I love stinks

item.title: PREPARE FOR A BIG MARKET CRASH SOON — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
PREPARE FOR A BIG MARKET CRASH SOON

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-03-05 13:59 UTC

OP

Bye bye rate cuts

Early replies (first 3)

61938721
>>61938715
The rate cut is an order. The Fed will comply or ICE sends them to Guatemala.

61938723
the new guy will do what hes told

61938731
If a putin profile pic twitter account says so it must be true

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938746
>>61938731
lmao

61938751
>>61938731
Much more credible than whatever jewish owned media you consume, tranny

61938752
China will make sure that they won't.

61938754
>>61938715
Ohnoes watammagonado? Have u got new news anon or just this old one?

61938757
>>61938751
Gas went up everywhere in the word. Included Russia where is even a shortage in some oblasts due refineries magically exploding

61938762
>>61938751
Russia is jewish owned, anon

61938786
>>61938757
If theres opportunity (even illogical one) to increase prices, why not to do that?

61938822
>world converts to catholicism
>crypto UBI
>everyone is happy
If these three things happen, it means the bible is true, since they were predicted 2k years ago.
The beast is the catholic church, who satan gave his power to, and its mark is sunday worship and its eucharist.


I have no idea how i can still be an atheist right now, but i NEED these three things.
Ok, probably only the first, since muslims and jews converting is beyond absurd.

61938866
>>61938822
Checked
Schizo sama i kneel...

61938885
Credit (especially private) markets are breaking, global central bank credit is rolling over, Hindenburg omens stacking, net savings as a % of gross national income going negative for the first time since 1929, bull steepening while the 2 year is mirroring behavioral crisis onset, 10 sigma VaR daily moves between asset class split plays on momentum moving between Korean stocks and bitcoin, bank heads messaging 2008 part deux and warning of a cyber attack from Iran, etc. Markets were going to crash anyways before anyone even mentioned Iran, this is just the narrative, just like repo blowing up in September 2019 and then March 2020 (covid) and 2001 (9/11). Oil priced in yen triggering unwind in global carry leverage will be a catalyst and spark for the rest. Look out below and buy when we're there. It's about to happen again.

61938904
>>61938822
You're misinformed. The Catholic Church is the church that Jesus Christ founded and He is the way, the truth, and the life. Give your life to the Lord and you will find true peace and eternal life.

61938922
>>61938715
get ready for fat retarded faggots crying on local news about not being able to fill up their F550 MEGASHART XXL sextuple cab dually ($1400/month payment for 96 months)

61939193
>>61938904
As an atheist, your post makes me roll my eyes, and fills me with nothing but contempt.
...But if i put myself in my possible future shoes, i am filled with dread and sadness for you, since you are bound for destruction in the fires of hell, your death eternal, as you obviously marvel after the beast.

61939200
You vill buy the electric car

61939202
>>61939193
Based

61939209
This is bidens economy you fucking bigots

61937341

61937376

61937380

61937447
>>61937311
>>61937341
>>61937380
ah it's my favorite kind of stinkie
the low 5 figure amount who didn't sell any appreciable amount
maybe he's staking a bit
but all around: he's a loser
guess what stinkbag: ur never gonna win
the day of salvation is not coming

>>61937447

>maybe he's staking a bit
I wish
>guess what stinkbag: ur never gonna win
How's your porn identity looking? Into furry tranny yet?

61938304

I don't know why you would want to but soon you will be able to very easily if you just really feel like draining your savings to findom serve sirgay

61938313

61938497

61938577

61938705

61938893

item.title: hello >chuckle "business and finance", I have bad news and good news for you. — 8 replies — 28.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
hello >chuckle "business and finance", I have bad news and good news for you.

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-05 13:49 UTC

OP

hello
>chuckle
"business and finance",
I have bad news and good news for you.
The bad news is all previous crypto narratives and meta are dead and are not coming back. Proof of work, smart contracts, forks, hashrate, memecoins, nfts, wizard shit...none of it is returning to pump any previous bags except for Bitcoin and maybe BNB. Pumpamentals don't really exist as the theories don't really span across different coins. None of the previously accepted fundamentals were relevant to price and never will be.

The good news is there is a way out. A new meta forming, if you will. And I, PENIS MAN am here to give information on it. I know you probably don't want to hear this (especially from a penis), but there is no ticker to shill and there is nothing to buy. But remember when Bitcoin could not be bought?

A major element of this whole thing you need to understand is that every crypto up until this point suffers from major distribution problems. I suppenis this was fine in the beginning, but it pretty much means any newly launched shitcoin is DOA at this point.

Can anyone guess at what the potential solutions are? I can reveal the answers in due time but I'm genuinely curious if anyone else knows. Who knows maybe I'm just a penis and don't really know anything

Early replies (first 3)

61938002
>>61938000
checked
well would you look at that?

61938090
>>61938000
The truth is people only use this board as a social validation tool, so cryptocurrency is a strong base for that retardation because of the get rich quick high volatility aspect of it. The irony in people using high speed fiber optics and edge computing to post about how decentralization is the only thing that matters should open your eyes enough. might as well change business and finance to crypto and crackheads while they're at it

61938114
>>61938090
I think you're right though at the same time I think people are leaving the herd and coming around to the idea that "crypto" as they knew it no longer exists and in many ways never existed in the way they thought. Therefore people are looking for the next thing. The next thing is crypto-native, but the days of goomblers just attempting to buy (or run an exe lol) early and profiting solely by virtue of being early are over.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938123
the new shitcoins are polymarket gambling, but you retards are too dumb to play that game, nobody cares about eth and solana shitcoins anymore

61938134
>>61938123
That's just literal gambling though. It's not novel, it's just a modern re-expression of legacy gambling. Catered perfectly to the deepest technomodern sensibilities of degenerate goomblers.

61938175
>>61938134
it actually is novel since it allows for creation of fleeting value, and it's only going to get crazier with the tokenization of everything including personal lives, imagine being able to bet on crazy things like your neighbour being late or that he didn't take a dump today, etc that sort of thing will now be possible

61938191
>>61938175
That and assassination markets and other crazy shit

61939163
>>61938175
>>61938191
I'm imagining it and it sounds kind of terrible. Which is saying a lot given that I am a penis.

Now what if there was a new type network that incentivizes earnest participation? What are the types of participation? Promotion? Meme creation perhaps? Penising? Building the network itself?
What if the protocol only distributes to users actually doing things? Versus what we have today where "participation" is holding a worthless bag and being a useless goombler who says "GM" in a Telegram chat.
Speaking of Telegram, is Telegram even a proper communication method for a crypto network? Is X? Tiktok? (lol)

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 7 replies — 13.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-03-05 13:36 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

i dont sell my dotty

item.title: Top of the dead cat bounce? — 30 replies — 90.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Top of the dead cat bounce?

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-03-05 13:46 UTC

OP

We just got denied at 73.8K, the top of March 2024's first selloff. This will be a VERY IDEAL time to short, if we really drop and didn't break out for at least 3 days from that line.

Early replies (first 3)

61938413
>>61938409
for newfags, who don't understand what i mean, there's always 1 event that follows a dead cat bounce at the end of every bullrun on every market

61938418
>>61938409
>>61938413
Experienced anon. Listen to him

61938423
no m8 it's all bs everything is it's just some richfags screwing with everyone because they're spiritually dead and can't enjoy life any other way. the richfags will pump and dump for the lols regardless of the chart patterns

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938424
>>61938409
$90k is the dead cat bounce, thats when you go full short

61938430
>>61938418
Thanks. Im just trying to help newerfags in playing the game a bit better, like the older fags who helped me back in 2018

>>61938423
>just some richfags screwing with everyone
Yea no shit everyone knows about it. This ain't /pol/ m8. Here, you either get fucked or join the richfags. And if you choose to get fucked, then stop dragging clueless newfags to your lower standard of life

61938434
>>61938424
I did short on 90K (well, actually i shorted a bit late, around 84K, just to be safe). But in my last thread, which is months ago, someone asked when will be the second best time to short, for those who didnt short aroun 90K.

That time has come, i think, if we didnt break out from 74K

61938446
>>61938424
I’d agree with you if there weren’t a fast moving military campaign in the middle east with consequences for the entire global economy.

61938481
>>61938446
Exactly what i mean. Plus in my opinion, that 90K drop started above my blue line. So in my pov, thats the start of bear market, not the top of the dead cat. Hell we wont even know if this rejection at 73.8K really is dead cat bounce's top. We need to wait for at least till sunday EST.

So if y'all wanna short now, please use a safe amount of margin, and a reasonable stop loss

61938582
I saw this prediction from IvanOnTech on youtube, he put out a new video today. Seems similar to what you're saying a bit. He was mostly right about the last bull run but I didn't listen to him and instead listened to some other people that ended up being wrong about everything so I missed most of it.

61938600
>>61938582
Ngl i didn't know who he is. And im not surprised that he has similar predictions with me, seeing that meme line TA is universal. But please keep in mind that, its not about right or wrong. Its about managing risk, as minimal as possible. The line helps, a lot.

Again, as for the top of this dead cat bounce, there's a chance that we will still pushing towards 84K. But at least, for me, thats unlikely. Use stop loss on your positions, m8, and good luck

61938640
>>61938600
some people might remember this one
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4TlaEZt6YmQ

61938646
>>61938640
Kek okay this actually funny

61938662
>>61938640
I don’t even have to click this to know what video it is

61938665
short selling should be illegal. imagine unironically rooting for prices to drop when you could be bullish instead

61938672
>>61938409
Agreed.

61938676
>>61938430
Based and moral pilled. Keep doing good, OP.

61938691
>>61938640
pamp up the jam
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IW_ZnjSfjEI

61938728
>>61938665
It can be really dodgy when institutions do it. They go on the news and try to scare the general public into selling and basically just make stuff up. I won't be shorting this time I don't think, I don't have a lot of money and not enough time to follow it a lot. I'm more just waiting for a discount and then will start dca'ing for a while into BTC and probably some other the other lower market cap coins. Might end up missing the bottom if it doesn't drop but I'm ok with that right now.

61938756
>>61938409
>muh golden cross muh death cross
sad! don't act like you're doing python studies on what happens after these events, moron!

61938891
>>61938728
If shorting is not your cup of tea then so be it. After all, the point is to gain profit yea? Personally, ill DCA when we're below 50K

>>61938756
I never said anything about golden cross or death cross. I also didnt mention anything about python?

Are you perhaps coping because you missed the top, and throw all your anger towards me? I just wanna help m8, but the decision to get rich and leave India is up to you and yours only

61938939
>>61938891
Hope you're right anon because I want to all-in on alts when this is over with

61938953
>>61938409
>Top of the dead cat bounce?
its already in

61938976
Charting does not work. I dont know what else to say. You can do a 50/200 average and buy when it goes too low.
By the time the 50 picks up over the 200, the price will be average and you will be mad you didnt buy some. No way to predict

61938993
>>61938953
We shall see m8. We shall see

>>61938976
It works for me. Also i didnt use 50/200 to buy and sell. I use it to help me draw accurate meme lines. My long and short positions comes from the lines, and my timing to buy comes from Stoch RSI and regular RSI.

Again it works charmingly for me

61939033
>>61938891
>After all, the point is to gain profit yea?
Yeah, I've tried it a bunch of times in the past and will likely try it again. I don't think there's anything wrong with individual investors doing it. I just meant the massive investors that try to manipulate the market on a large scale. The whole gamestop thing highlighted a bunch of it, how the hedge funds manipulate people etc.

61939040
>>61939033
Then good luck m8. Me, imma try to short to gain more fund for DCA ing in the future

61939078
>>61938409
This is not the ideal time to short. You want to short at 85-90k. You're literally shorting the bottom of the range. If you're shorting with 4x or less leverage, then fine. But any more than that and you're going to get liquidated on the test of 90k.
Just wait for the test of 90k and short with a stoploss at 100k
>>61938640
Praise the pamp

61939098
>>61939078
>you're going to get liquidated on the test of 90k.
Bruh there's this thing called "stop loss" limit, like you literally just said? If you wanna short now, just put the stop loss at 74K or a bit higher

61939144
>>61939078
The high probability short is at 90k -> 20k.
>>61939078
You're just asking to be stopped out though since there's a huge block of stops exactly in that price range currently. Unless you're just shorting to 70k or something around there. But, there's structure forming between 72k and 74k, so it could just range here and stop out the shorts again.

Not a good short if you ask me.

61939150
>>61939098
Whoops, replied to myself too many times lol
>>61939098
Second half was meant for you.

item.title: The US has 10 days — 55 replies — 16.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-03-05 10:46 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938494
>>61938472
>>61938487
unreliable or expensive access to energy*

61938502
>>61938341
hormuz doesn't matter at all for US. has 0 influence on us. the war will have some impact but it doesn't really matter, the most impactful part of all this is shelling out free money to israel which lowers trust in the market. as well gay oil and energy companies taking advantage of the already strapped consumer yet again
instead of domestic energy being invested in jews need that

61938506
>>61938487
that logic still makes no sense since if it works, you are bankrupting the world, who will buy your goods if they don't have energy to run their houses or drive their cars, energy is a basic need, after food

61938510
>>61938341
irrelevant
i sleep

61938517
>>61938506
A normal person isn’t the investor here lmao. You think billionaires, multinationals, and global investment firms will be struggling to eat?

61938518
Retard here, so what should I put my money into long term?

61938521
>>61938506
>>61938517
It won’t be production of everyday goods m8

61938522
>>61938517
no investor profits in a scenario where peasants don't have access to basic needs, this is a retarded argument

61938528
>>61938341
This crisis will be resolved in 5 days 5

>>61938411
>>61938425
>>61938428
There is no reason to be this upset. Jews and Sauds and US and shipping companies are cutting a deal with insurance and logistics guarantees.

61938532
>>61938522
Okay what do you think will be produced here and how poor do you think the whole world will get? You’re being hyperbolic.

61938534
>>61938506
Logic? Introducing a financial tactics from a hundred years ago (tariffs) to somehow try to force companies to produce shit at higher cost in you country and thus fucking everyone over, where's the logic in that? We have entered the Idiocracy timeline, abandon all hopes of competency and reason.

61938536
>>61938528
yes they can cut all the deals they want, it doesn't guarantee tankers won't be bombed, remember that the red sea is also being chocked by the houthis

61938544
>>61938532
what do you mean, what will be produced, the rest of the world relies on propane gas and kerosene for cooking, not like in the us where electricity is cheap enough for induction cookers, there's also the issue of jet fuel for transportation, there's also electricity generation that relies on diesel, vehicle fuel, etc if this is not available for one week, what do you think will happen to the rest of the world while they wait for the us to ship them consumer electronics and other non essentials, wtf are you talking about

61938547
>>61938544
You’re obviously confused and I no longer want to explain shit. Good day

61938558
>>61938536
Anon shipping doesn't stop. It can be delayed but it will not stop. These guys are always under threat, what has changed since the days of black beard? Irgc, hezbollah and the various ragtag sunni and shia militias funded by iran and hamas will extremely soon lack enough firepower to seriously damage these big ships. The guy who said they're about down to lawn mower engines is right. It actually makes me furious we lived in global fear for 50 years because of these psychos and nobody had the political will to go in and finally kill the main bad guy after all the expensive boondoggles chasing their shadow.

61938569
>>61938425
Bibi doesn't care, this was all his doing anyway. The goal is to remove the final major opposition that Israel has in the middle-east and they can do whatever they want because USA will bail their asses both militarily and economically if anything were to happen.

61938578
>>61938569
What is israel's next goal after iran? Dont say greater israel, that is retarded.

61938587
>>61938341
Sure, but all of this can end in 1 message.
> Hormuz Strait open again
Will it come at some point?

61938592
>>61938578
Slowly choking out the palestinians until they either just leave or get replaced.

61938594
>>61938587
It literally is open rn.
It makes me so mad stupid people have careers and families and money but I just seethe here being right about most things just watching the fucking world obliviate itself. It is so maddening. I wish i ruled over all of you.

61938601
>>61938594
Not really, insurance companies refuse to cover the ships if they get into a war zone.
And there have been some attacks on ships already.
This pic is right now. Ships are clumping and not moving.

61938609
>>61938592
The arab states with millions of palestinian refugees who refuse to recognize palestinians as citizens of their countries must have a reason to do so...

61938617
>>61938601
>most are underway with progressing ETAs

Chang, i need a job badly. What is pay like as a wumao in the big '26?

61938638
>>61938617
Are you trolling or retarded?

61938648
>>61938341
Ok cool but whats the thing with this epstein guy and the gorillions of non-existent dollars pumped into a failed ai experiment?

61938664
>>61938341
Based analysis. Credit markets are breaking, global central bank credit is rolling over, Hindenburg omens stacking, net savings as a % of gross national income going negative for the first time since 1929, bull steepening while the 2 year is mirroring behavioral crisis onset, 10 sigma VaR daily moves between asset class split plays on momentum moving between Korean stocks and bitcoin, bank heads messaging 2008 part deux and warning of a cyber attack from Iran, etc. Markets were going to crash anyways before anyone even mentioned Iran, this is just the narrative, just like repo blowing up in September 2019 and then March 2020 (covid) and 2001 (9/11). Oil priced in yen triggering unwind in global carry leverage will be a catalyst and spark for the rest. Look out below and buy when we're there. It's about to happen again.

61938724
>>61938664
In english Doc

61938734
>>61938341
what does this mean for my physical gold?

61938742
>>61938402
The ship crew are civilians not military

61938770
>>61938578
or what anon.
this is was the goal all along.
to create political system where Israel controls the entire middle east and doesn't face any oppression.
that's the only way Israel could continue have economic growth without relaying on foreign aid or selling military weapons to other countries

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 100 replies — 15.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 100 • Updated: 2026-03-05 07:26 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

61934942
it begins...

61935122
Toads invade shib threads because its a zero volume zero interest and zero attention, its been a shit coin since early 2023. 1.9k holders that want to kys. Lol, lmao even.

61935440
>>61931779
SHIB blessing thread anon still here, i'm still here waiting for the time and it's going to happen

61936417
>>61935122
No u. Toad holders are going to make it.

61936442
my itch is on cheese, already bottomed only upwards from here

61936453
>>61936442
No fuck off with that jeet scam. Toad is not a jeet scam it's an Israeli/US government scam.

61937292
>>61899833
Luna never got a crack last time

61937454
>>61899833
I own $10,000 worth of Shib and that pile of shit isn't going anywhere.
Once is goes 25% up I'm dumping it asap.

61937481
>>61937454
>isn't going
>once is goes
?

61937662
>>61937454
Smart. Grab a moonbag of toadkiller and prepare for the biggest dopamine rush of your life

61938369
>>61937454

item.title: Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy — 78 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-03-05 04:21 UTC

OP

Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Early replies (first 3)

61931291
This is just a coon who doesn't understand investments and compounding returns.

61931302
>>61931288
Probably bought a bunch of houses and cars that he couldn't afford the maintenance and taxes on

61931311
>>61931302
>>61931291
>>61931288
He's right though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933005
>>61931288
Why are you faggots obsessed with "generational" wealth? Even if you raise your children perfectly, it is only a matter of a few generations down the line before they become decadent and lose your fortune. At most just provide them a beater car, a starter house, and pay for their education.

61933411
>>61931288
they could give him 100 billion and he'd still go bankrupt
funny how you only see this with blacks, everyone else seems to have little issue managing money

61934349
>>61933005
>just let all the other groups that hate you have wealth and status bro

61934356
>>61931967
you can't read?

61934424
>>61933005
Black people love catchy sayings like "generational wealth", especially TV blacks. They get any kind of money and recognition and then they want to larp as Malcom X for some reason, even if they still do nigga shit like having baby mommas and getting arrested.

61934468
>>61932022

Rookies also go through a league mandated financial education class to help prevent the bankruptcies. Just really hard to get someone in the USA to understand temporality

61934564
>>61932553
Theres 8 billion niggas on earth
There are probably 10 million boomers worth over 1 million in california alone because of their houses they bought in the 90s at a quarter of the current valuation

61934569
>>61931288
But a Bieber BBC BJ is priceless

61934572
>>61934349
the shitmigrants around me definitely dont have generational wealth,,, theyre more of a nuisance .....

61934605
aren't there like black wealth managers or family offices for these retards in some place like atlanta, it would be a good way to get rich

61934641
>>61931311
oh man only $12 million a year, how do these poor oppressed black men survive on so little? with such tiny paychecks you won't even have any money left to invest after paying your bills

61934654
Most people don't know how to adjust after living like this. He's getting paid 20M a year, and he isn't going to be paid 20M a year for long. Even if he invests it well, he still isn't going to go back to 20M a year.

61934927
>>61931288
>niggerball player is bad with money, can't survive on a measly $100 million
This is why white people need to pay reparations. There are millions of niggers just like this in this country living hand to mouth because of racism. How is little Jayquerius expected to afford his malt liquor and hennessy in these conditions?

61937100
>>61934424
But here it is mostly white men who want to give the ideal trad upbringing to their children and make it possible several generations forward without relying on the evil pozzed world too much and for that they need a gajillion dollars.
The trvthpill here is that it is a game of chance. Every generation is a roll of the dice. Just do your best to raise your own family and don't try to plan 10 generations ahead.

61937293
>>61931302
>>61931362
Yup. To blow that much money they:

>Pay off debts of vaguely related friends and family
>Buy friends and family cars and other bling
>Stupidly big properties
>Loads of super cars
>Take an entourage to da club
>Hookers and blow

It's not to say $12M a year isn't a lot of money. But supporting a stupidly large lifestyle for 20 people going all out is only barely feasible for that.

If you just lived with your family and had a nice property or three and went to a nice wine store for your Dom Perignon and took yourself and the missus out to three star Michelin restaurants and flew first/business class and paid for housekeepers and gardeners and an assistant and bought a Patek for yourself and the lady once a year you totally could.

61937296
>>61931288
You have to be a genuine dumbass to be able to spend that amount of money

61937513
>>61931288
he deserves permanent debt

61937521
That is what happens when you don't live frugally and spend it all. All he had to do was live in a million dollar shit box in the nice neighborhood, go on an occasional vacation and send his kids through college. He would have spent only 5 million at most in his lifetime. Maybe 10 million if he had a bunch of emergency expenses. 10 generations of wealth right there not counting for inflation.

61937541
>>61937521
a) Darkies can't even plan ten minutes ahead, let alone twenty years.
b) I believe what >>61932636 said where sportsball leagues intentionally encourage players to be lavish and short-term in focus as a means of control; a player who's financially secure is in a position to dictate terms to the team/league. A player who's one missed paycheque away from insolvency isn't.

61937542
>>61937100
I see, you're responding to OPs comment, not example.
The real answer is because his comment was a shitpost and the real purpose of this thread is to laugh at low IQ pro athletes, I don't think this board is actually obsessed with generational wealth. A lot of guys here just like to imagine what ifs, like what if they ever had a family and were the monopoly man.

61937562
>>61933005
It's the illusion of stability. It especially makes sense for black people. White sons from the top quintile are like 80% likely to stay in in the top quintile. Black sons are only 20% likely, they almost always end up less successful than their parents. So, it makes sense for those parents to want to shore up their chances, since the system seems stacked against them.
But it really is a betrayal of the American ethos. Outcomes for white boys should be more like those of black boys, as an equal share of each quintile ending up in each quintile would be indicative of a true meritocracy. Most people don't seem to understand that, when they say that they want generational wealth, they're saying they want aristocracy.

61937567
>>61934605
It's just a coincidence that there don't seem to be enough of them.

61937570
>>61937542
Those two things aren't mutually exclusive and both are actually helpful if the true emotional goal is coping without actually changing anything about their own lives. Mindless fantasizing and punching down on perceived inferiors, perfect ingredients for a Copium and Tonic.

61937571
>>61937567
this is like saying if we built more libraries then these people would become more literate

61937575
>>61937521
If you had 55mill(post taxes) and literally lost all of it to the point of not even having a property you have to have had maximum idiotic decision making.
Maximized credits
Gifting money that you aren't getting back
Buying multiple depreciating resources
Extremely expensive alcohol and food every day
Paying double for jewellry worksmanship over material for bling
Hookers and blow maxxing every day

That said nigga probably lived all he had to live already

61937720
>>61937575
Hookers? He would have had fans who would have sex with him for free. Marry one that would be reliable for taking care of the home if not already married like most athletes do.

61937745
>>61932058
>Billie eyelash
What's wrong with her finances?

61937749
>>61937720
Kinda jelly though I only have a bit over 1m after full liquidation I know I can live tightly indefinitely with that but indefinitely won't last through a bad market crash with that but with about double I don't see how that could happen

61937766
>>61937571
Yes.
But also, it's just a coincidence.

61938098
>>61937766
how, because jews are the majority? or because they don't want their wealth managed by outsiders, considering that people they look up to like lebron and michael jordan obviously have their wealth maanged.

61925435

61927063

n

l

61927377

61932537

item.title: /pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins — 85 replies — 4.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
/pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:27 UTC

OP

ARR!

Early replies (first 3)

61926222
yarrr

61926235
>>61926222
arr har har harr! get ye telescope and check this shipmate!

61926254
Arrgh matey, IQCHADJEETs Silva stock bussin nigga frfr on kirk nigga

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61929747
>>61929582
People who got rich have multi generational wealth spend money to cause things to fulfil prophesies because they are bored. It works until people catch on and can figure out when they buy and sell stuff. Purim blood moon at 3:33 AM PST? Massive sell off. Sell some of your stocks and before that day especially institutional investor heavy stocks. Then wait for cheapies in things you were eyeing. Just bought a share of an oil stock that dumped. Makes no sense that it would dump when it was showing the start of a long slow upward trajectory before a classic bull run. And that was before the Iran thing. Oil stock are hardly dumping because they shouldn't be. Aware people are buying today while they dump good stocks for no apparent reason because of dumb rituals. I will wait much longer for other things. I know this could go on for years.

61929770
>>61926208
Anyone else remember AYY lmao coin anon?
Had to sell all his coins because of a family emergency like 2 years ago

I still think about this alien coins he had some fucking cool shit
Poor fucker missed the pump

61929916
>>61929486
Anyone ever tried or had luck with refunding from TD precious metals? Shithawking the chart before I send off my email, knowing today it’ll pull some Talmud magic and moon when I ask for a refund/get refunded

61930008
>>61926208
4 March 2027, we meet and see who has the last laugh. You confident?

61931300
>>61930008
2027? absolutely. but you should be in a bunker by then.

61931346
>>61928874
never left, glad to see you too shipmate
>>61928544
this shipmate knows the course.
>>61928696
would buy that coin if i saw it in a shop, gave me a hearty har har!

61931497
kek baggies

61931541
This shit is too jewed, I'm going back to trading natural gas

61931566
kek shaggies

61931581
>>61931541
>fiat brain

61931664
>>61931497
>>61931541
^land lubbers

61931697
OP I have been enjoying your in-character Long John Silver posts.

61931715
>>61931697
it be the way of a pirate, t'be sure. make merry and enjoy life! especially when there be plunder to be had booty to be hoarding! nothing be warming the heart like the glow of gold from within me chest, ARR!

61931989
>>61931715
Yo-Ho
I've restocked the Flying Dutchman Captain

61932481
>>61931989
I regret buying moderately priced gin this week. I will pull out my free whiskey I looted from my relative's liquor cabinet. And yes I did loot. Boomer fag buys liquor faster than he can drink and forgets what he has. He wouldn't miss it. I am telling you Captain Silver, Boomer liquor cabinets have the best forgotten booze to take as booty.

61932523
>>61932481
Good man. Also damn you could be my nephew someday soon I better watch my stash"P

61933973
>>61926208
>OH FUCK SHILLCOIN IS CRASHING
>WE ARE SO BACK
>OH FUCK SHILLCOIN IS CRASHING
>WE ARE SO BACK
Crypto is so fucking volatile, there is going to be a day when it crashes, and it aint coming back.

61935549
>>61931989

61935587
>>61935549
Is there a Captain Morgan in there? Looks like it is all bourbon and whisky. I already have lots of whisky and some bourbon.

61935612
just bought about $1k more silver.
i expect a little dip, but just in case, I'm hoarding some booty now.
check this shipmate again >>61928544 i bought bitcoin in nov 2022, i had a feeling that was the dip. i have the same feeling now about silver. march is the last entry.

61935623
>>61935587
captain morgan is good, but it all does the same job!
ultimate pirate grog: mix one shot of everything you have in a tankard, add 2x as much water, dash of cinnamon and a teaspoon of sugar.

61935778
>>61935623
And not drink that nice booze straight or with the right juice? Yeesh! Does pirate grog go well with a meal of leather belts?

61935853
>>61935778
aye! that be all we had left after the weevil infestation, t'was 20 days from shore and the boots went down well after a few swigs of grog too!

61935915
>>61935587
Sadly some scallywag already drank all the rum.
(It was me):)

61935939
Point of order- on our next alcohol restock the ship needs those mini bottles of rum and other drinks so as to make merry and pretend we're in fact giants drinking normal sized bottles of booze.

61935978
>>61935915
Jack Sparrow is that you? Are you getting better at figuring out why the rum is gone?

61936093
>>61935939
lmao
>>61935915
ever thought about smoking a pipe? the secret key is to blow through it a little too to keep it alight. and the tobaccos you can get- lord i am not worthy, they're so delicious, make cigarettes seem like burning paint by comparison.

61936418
>>61936093
It could be great yeah. But a pipe requires maintenance and upkeep. It's a cool.idea maybe one day:)

61936426
>>61935978
:D

item.title: This wagie has escaped — 47 replies — 4.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
This wagie has escaped

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-05 04:01 UTC

OP

I did it anons. I escaped the wagie cage, work offered me a redundancy thinking i would say no and ask to be redployed in another shitty role.
The HR roastie was visibly shaken. "But anon, the market is tough right now!" After 15 years i have paid off all debt and saved plus will be 200k after tax redundancy.

After selling my house, this will give me enough to retire in SEA. Fuck waging.

Early replies (first 3)

61933494
>>61933477
kek

61933581
>>61933477
The Light abandons no man

61933627
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
ehhhhhhhhhh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61935462
>>61933477
You sound like a two digits IQ idealistic faggot but I admire your balls.
t. 44 years old NEET self-sustained god that has been neeting since his early twenties

61935470
I have like 2m and still feel poor

61935590
>>61933477
Fuck you cock sucker motherfucker AAAAGGGGGHHHHHHHH

61935647
>>61933725
In Eastern Europe? Fucking retard you can buy a $30k commie apartment and live with $800 per month and your propriety will also grow in value over time and I'm not talking some shithole like Moldova where having $500 in your pocket makes you rich.
Why the fuck are you paying $1500 per month to live in SEA and live with browns? That will turn into $2000 soon then $2500 and so on.

61935688
>>61935647
where in eastern europe?

61935716
>>61935647
Do they really let foreigners buy in those places?
Will they give me citizenship?
Are all those countries full of sociopathic emotionless corrupt people like Russians?

61935721
>>61933477
Congrats on the escape. I hope I can too but for now I’m happy some anon has freed themselves.

61935822
>>61933866
best advice in this thread
>>61933899
Check out a few different places around the world before you decide to commit to just one.
With over a million you can easily dump it into dividend/income focused ETFs and retire to a modest life pretty much anymore you want. SEA is selling yourself short.

61935846
>>61935716
>noooo people aren't smiling for no reason all the time, they're literally insane
You're not fit to live with slavs, stick to Latin America

61935869
>>61935647
lol dipshit, does all your knowledge of russia come from /pol/ and fox jews?
Every intelligent russian with money is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was, meanwhile you have turbo virgins who spend all their time crying on the internet and sucking trump's dick trying to convince you it's some white paradise.
I hope you migrate over there and get raped by an arab or central asian mongoloid.

61936723
You will love it... till you don't know what to do next. And then you'll start a bar (and usually fail like many farangs), find that you are out of money and you'll be worried what else to do
till you will be back to work.

61936931
>>61936723
There’s so many ass blasted cucks here. What do you think all the thirdies taking all the jobs do when they work in America? They send the money back home and then leave the country when they have enough to be rich and retire over there. Heaven forbid an American who actually worked for his money leaves

61936945
>>61933862
1mill is made it point for me at like lowest of standards I'd accept so yeah thats it enjoy

61937074
>>61936945
He’s not planning on living in America retard.

61937111
>>61933725
>>61933844
Thats 13 years worth of poverty wages anon. You're gonna have a bad time. Unless you plan to put it in a high yield divvy stock or savings acct and live off the interest.

61937117
>>61933862
Oh ok. Plus a mill I mean sure yeah, go nuts. Living off the interest not principal is still a good idea though. You can live like a kang... in America even in one of the poorer states, off that kind of scratch.

61937202
>>61933477
How do you even retire in sea? Won't you get scammed there?

61937294
>>61937074
Yeah with 1mill im not affording america anhwhere not that theres anything to afford here since its all shit

61937302
>>61935688
NTA, but $1500 is close to median pay in Poland after taxes.

61937315
>>61937302
What east europe places are safe to live in when you have 15k worth of electronics

61937321
>>61937202
What im wondering is how hes planning to stay there. I personally would move to sk permanently but visas are a thing. I only got eu/us nationality

61937357
>>61937315
Poland's pretty safe nowadays.

61937362
There's a bit of seething on here from the usual suspects, but thank you to the anons who support my mission live free of the zog

61937422
>>61933477
I admire your balls anon. I feel like living there would make you a target. Maybe get a guard dog.

61937534
>>61937362
Good on you escaping the cage

61937556
>>61935869
>Every paid leftist and ukrainian shill is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was,
Only paid shills would tell you this. Be careful.
> central asian mongoloid.
Don't move to Uzbekistan.

61937558
>>61933725
>>61933831
Congrats anon for escaping the cage hell, and HR roasties.

61937566
>>61933873
you better have low standards or really be open minded ,dont be an asshole to locals, good luck

61938048
>>61937294
There's plenty of places in America where you can live indefinitely off 1M. I probably live off $30K / yr and I waste money like crazy. Do you really want to be in a crowded, foreign country when shit hits the fan, OP?

61938066
>>61933477
>retire in SEA

Ya blew it
